title: Application policies - Canada.ca
content:
## Application policies
Reasonableness of Producer Fees and Questions and Answers ( Q&A )
Related Party Transactions
Interest Expenses – Canadian Film or Video Production Tax Credit
Application of the phrase "directly attributable" that is found in the definition of "labour expenditure" in subsection 125.4(1) of the Income Tax Act and in the definition of "Canadian labour expenditure" in subsection 125.5(1) of the Act.
